Class StringBasedQuery

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query.StringBasedQuery
public class StringBasedQuery extends Object
String-based Query abstracting a CQL query with parameter bindings.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Marcin Grzejszczak

  • Constructor Details

    • StringBasedQuery

      public StringBasedQuery(String query, CassandraParameters parameters, ValueExpressionParser expressionParser)
      Create a new StringBasedQuery given query, CassandraParameters and ValueExpressionDelegate.
      Parameters:
      query - must not be empty.
      parameters - must not be null.
      expressionParser - must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • getExpressionDependencies

      public ExpressionDependencies getExpressionDependencies()
      Obtain ExpressionDependencies from the parsed query.
      Returns:
      the ExpressionDependencies from the parsed query.

      Returns the query with parameter bindings replaced with anonymous ? placeholders.
